description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the cheapest weekend chalet with a hot tub under $250/night within 5 km of the ski lifts
tasks.description: Find chalets for a specific weekend, filter for 4 adults, hot tub amenity, max $250 per night, and within 5 km of the ski lifts, then start a booking on the cheapest option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the 'Chalets' or 'Accommodations' menu item in the main navigation.
Use the date picker to select a 2-night weekend stay from Friday March 6th to Sunday March 8th (same year as today).
Set the guests field to 4 adults and 0 children, then apply the search or availability button.
In the filters sidebar, set the maximum nightly price to $250 and enable the 'Hot tub' amenity filter.
In the location or distance filter, select the option that limits results to chalets within 5 km of the ski lifts, then apply the filters.
Use the sort dropdown and select 'Price: Low to High' so that the cheapest chalet appears first.
Click on the first chalet result in the list (the cheapest one meeting the criteria) to open its details page.
On the chalet details page, click the primary action button labeled 'Book now' or similar to proceed to the booking details form.

tasks.name: Compare two similarly priced chalets and favorite the one with the higher rating
tasks.description: Search for chalets for a given date range, identify two chalets priced between $180 and $220 per night, compare their star ratings, and add the higher-rated one to your favorites list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Chalets' or 'Find a chalet' section.
Set a 3-night stay by choosing check-in on Friday April 10th and check-out on Monday April 13th (same year as today), then run the search.
If available, set the guests to 2 adults and apply the search to refresh results.
In the filters or search results, scroll until you find at least two chalets with nightly prices between $180 and $220, then note their names.
Click on the first chalet in that price range to open its details page and read its overall star rating and number of reviews.

Use the browser back button or site navigation to return to the results list, then click on the second chalet in that price range to open its details page and read its overall star rating and number of reviews.
Compare the star ratings of the two chalets and decide which one has the higher rating (if tied, choose the one with more reviews).
On the details page of the chosen chalet, click the 'Add to favorites' or heart icon to save this chalet to your favorites list.

tasks.name: Book a 5-night pet-friendly family chalet with sauna and 3+ bedrooms under $2000 total
tasks.description: Search for a 5-night stay for 6 adults and 2 children in a pet-friendly chalet with at least 3 bedrooms and a sauna, making sure the total stay cost shown is under $2000, then proceed to the booking summary.
steps: Open the homepage and click on the 'Chalets' booking section.
Use the date picker to select a 5-night stay from Monday July 6th to Saturday July 11th (same year as today).
Set the guest configuration to 6 adults and 2 children, then apply the search.
In the filters panel, enable the 'Pet-friendly' option and select '3+ bedrooms' from the bedrooms filter.
In the amenities filter, check the box for 'Sauna' to only show chalets that include a sauna.
If available, set a 'Total price' filter or max budget to $2000, or visually scan the results list to find chalets whose displayed total price for the stay is under $2000.
From the options that meet all criteria, click on the first chalet whose total price for the 5-night stay is under $2000 to open its details page.

On the chalet details page, click the 'Book now' or equivalent button, then on the booking form page select the same dates and guest counts if needed and proceed to the booking summary or review page.

tasks.name: Create a 3-day grocery delivery order with 5 specific food items for chalet fridge stocking
tasks.description: Use the e-store to add exactly 5 food items: 2 breakfast items under $8 each, 2 dinner mains between $10 and $20 each, and 1 snack with rating 4.5+ stars, then choose 'Chalet fridge stocking' delivery and select chalet and date.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Store' or 'Grocery & Essentials' section.

In the store categories, navigate to the 'Breakfast' category and add 2 different breakfast items that each cost less than $8 by opening each product page and clicking 'Add to cart' with quantity set to 1.
Return to the store categories and open the 'Dinner' or 'Ready meals' category.
Within this category, identify 2 main dish items priced between $10 and $20 each, open their product pages, and click 'Add to cart' for each with quantity set to 1.
Next, go to the 'Snacks' category using the navigation menu.
In the snacks list, use filters to show items with a rating of at least 4.5 stars and add 1 such snack item to the cart with quantity set to 1.
Click on the cart icon in the header to open the cart or basket page and ensure the total item count in the cart is exactly 5.

On the cart or checkout page, choose 'Chalet fridge stocking' or 'Deliver to chalet before arrival' as the delivery option, then select a chalet from the provided dropdown and set the delivery date to the day of check-in (e.g., the upcoming Friday).

tasks.name: Assemble a winter gear bundle with free shipping, 4.5+ rating, and total under $180
tasks.description: Buy one pair of ski gloves, one beanie, and one set of thermal socks from the e-store, each with rating 4.5+ stars, all marked with free shipping, and keep the combined subtotal under $180, preferring blue color when available.
steps: From any page, click on the 'Store' or 'Shop gear' section.
Open the 'Clothing & Accessories' category and then the 'Ski gloves' subcategory.

Use filters to show only products with a rating of at least 4.5 stars and free shipping, then select one pair of ski gloves priced under $80, prefer a blue color variant if that option exists, and add quantity 1 to the cart.
Navigate back to the 'Clothing & Accessories' category and open the 'Beanies' or 'Hats' subcategory.
Apply a 4.5+ star rating filter, choose a beanie that offers free shipping and costs under $60, select a blue color if available, and add quantity 1 to the cart.
Go to the 'Socks' or 'Thermal wear' subcategory using the category menu.
Filter or sort to find a set of thermal socks with rating 4.5+ stars and free shipping that costs under $40, then add quantity 1 of that product to the cart.
Open the cart page from the header and, if necessary, adjust items to ensure the combined subtotal of the gloves, beanie, and socks is less than $180 while keeping one of each item type in the cart.

tasks.name: Order a fireplace and game night package for your chalet stay
tasks.description: Create an order that includes 2 packs of firewood, 1 box of matches, 3 candles, and 2 different board games (one suitable for 2–4 players and one for 4–8 players), then select 'Deliver to chalet' and set a delivery date matching your check-in.
steps: Click on the 'Store' section from the main navigation and select the 'Fireplace & Comfort' category.
In this category, open a firewood product and set the quantity to 2 packs before clicking 'Add to cart'.
Locate a box of matches product within the same or related category and add quantity 1 of that product to the cart.
Navigate to the 'Candles & Ambience' subcategory and add a candle product with quantity set to 3 to the cart.
Use the categories menu to go to the 'Games & Entertainment' section.
From the list of board games, add 1 game specifically labeled for 2–4 players and 1 different game labeled for 4–8 players to the cart, each with quantity set to 1.
Open the cart page and click the button to proceed to checkout.

On the checkout page, choose the 'Deliver to chalet' delivery option, select your chalet from the dropdown, and set the delivery date to match your next check-in date (for example, the next Saturday).

tasks.name: Purchase two digital chalet gift vouchers with specific values and a custom message
tasks.description: Use the e-store to buy one $100 and one $50 digital gift voucher, choose email delivery (within the site), and add the same personalized message to both before proceeding to the payment page.
steps: From the homepage, open the 'Store' section and select the 'Gift cards' or 'Vouchers' category.

Choose the digital chalet stay gift card product and, in the value selection area, select or enter $100 as the amount, then type the recipient email as 'friend1@example.com' and add a message reading 'Enjoy a cozy chalet weekend on me!' before adding it to the cart.

On the same or similar gift card product page, configure a second card with the amount set to $50, recipient email 'friend2@example.com', and the same message 'Enjoy a cozy chalet weekend on me!', then add it to the cart.
Click the cart icon to go to the cart page and ensure both gift cards are listed with the correct amounts ($100 and $50).
Click the 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to checkout' button.
On the checkout form, fill in the purchaser details including name, billing address, and email address 'buyer@example.com'.
Continue through the checkout flow until you reach the payment method selection page (stop before entering any real payment details).

tasks.name: Add stay extras to an existing chalet booking while keeping add-ons under $120 per adult
tasks.description: Use the 'Manage booking' section to open an existing booking, then add airport transfer, daily breakfast, and late checkout extras for 2 adults while keeping the total cost of add-ons under $240 (i.e., $120 per adult).
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Manage booking' or 'My booking' link in the header.
On the booking lookup form, enter the booking reference code 'ABC123' and last name 'Smith' into the appropriate fields, then submit the form.
On the booking details page, locate and click the 'Add services' or 'Add extras' button.
In the extras list, add an airport transfer service for 2 adults by selecting the round-trip option and setting the passenger count to 2, then add it to the booking.
Next, find the 'Daily breakfast' extra and add it for the entire stay for 2 adults by selecting the correct duration or date range and applying it.
Locate the 'Late checkout' add-on and add it once for the departure day of the stay.

Review the list of selected extras and, if the combined cost of the added services exceeds $240, remove or downgrade one extra (for example, switch airport transfer to one-way) until the total is $240 or less.
Once the extras meet the budget, click the button labeled 'Update booking' or 'Save changes' to apply the selected add-ons to the booking.
